modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: TMA phone number needs to be updated on iSD and email.

full_description_text: A field technician was trying to update the TMA phone number on the iSD and email. They created a Work Order from the Request Log, but it was accepted without a location mentioned in the subject line. This has caused some confusion regarding the contact details that need to be changed.
